ROOM 220, JUDGE LITTLE, GGOROSIN, CLERK C/C FOR TRIAL BY JURY, ALL PARTIES PRESENT. DEFTS IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED, TERMS NOT PUT ON THE RECORD BUT CONTAINED IN A STIPULATED JUDGMENT SUBMITTED TO THE COURT FOR SIGNATURE.

C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. HOWARD J. BERMAN, PRO TEM JUDGE D. CARTER, CLERK. KAREN BAUER, CSR. PARTIES PRESENT: MAGNE VIEMOEN, PLAINTIFF. CLIFFORD HANSEN, ATTORNEY FOR PLAINTIFF. BILL (WILLIAM) COLLINS DEFENDANT. LINDA CLINTON CO-DEFENDANT. BOTH DEFTS. APPEARED IN PRO PER. 3:00 P.M. CASE DID NOT SETTLE. TO JURY TRIAL ON 8/12/98.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CLINTON, LINDA COLLINS, BILL (WILLIAM) THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 509 MINNA ST. ROOM 324, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL SEP-01-1998, LEASE FORFEITED
